```{r}
    estimand = case_when(
      str_detect(param, "^ciL_XY_") ~ "XY",
      str_detect(param, "^ciL_YX_") ~ "YX",
      str_detect(param, "^ciL_A_")  ~ "AX",
      str_detect(param, "^ciL_AY_") ~ "AY"
    ),
    method = param %>%
      str_remove("^ciL_(XY|YX|A|AY)_") %>%
      recode(
        CLPM      = "CLPM",
        CLPM_Adj  = "Lin adj",
        CLPM_LBCA = "CLPM linear BCA",
        CLPM_XGB  = "CLPM XGB BCA",
        DPM       = "DPM",
        RI_CLPM   = "RI-CLPM"
      )
  ) %>%
  select(run, occasion, scenario, estimand, method, ciL)

#####################################################
# --- CI upper bounds ---
#####################################################

ciU_df <- results_sim2 %>%
  filter(occasion >= 2) %>%

  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^ciU_(XY|YX|A|AY)_"),
    names_to  = "param",
    values_to = "ciU"
  ) %>%

  mutate(
    estimand = case_when(
      str_detect(param, "^ciU_XY_") ~ "XY",
      str_detect(param, "^ciU_YX_") ~ "YX",
      str_detect(param, "^ciU_A_")  ~ "AX",
      str_detect(param, "^ciU_AY_") ~ "AY"
    ),
    method = param %>%
      str_remove("^ciU_(XY|YX|A|AY)_") %>%
      recode(
        CLPM      = "CLPM",
        CLPM_Adj  = "Lin adj",
        CLPM_LBCA = "CLPM linear BCA",
        CLPM_XGB  = "CLPM XGB BCA",
        DPM       = "DPM",
        RI_CLPM   = "RI-CLPM"
      )
  ) %>%
  select(run, occasion, scenario, estimand, method, ciU)

#####################################################
# --- combine everything ---
#####################################################

coverage_df <- est_df %>%
  left_join(ciL_df, by = c("run","occasion","scenario","estimand","method")) %>%
  left_join(ciU_df, by = c("run","occasion","scenario","estimand","method")) %>%
  left_join(true_params, by = "estimand") %>%

  filter(!is.na(ciL), !is.na(ciU)) %>%

  mutate(
    covered = (ciL <= true & true <= ciU)
  ) %>%

  group_by(scenario, occasion, estimand, method) %>%
  reframe(
    nsim = n(),
    coverage = mean(covered),
    mcse_coverage = sqrt(coverage * (1 - coverage) / nsim)
  ) %>%

  mutate(
    scenario = factor(scenario, levels = c("constant", "stepwise")),
    method   = factor(
      method,
      levels = c(
        "CLPM",
        "Lin adj",
        "CLPM linear BCA",
        "CLPM XGB BCA",
        "DPM",
        "RI-CLPM"
      )
    )
  )

#####################################################
# Colour palette for methods
#####################################################

pal_method <- qualitative_hcl(
  n = nlevels(coverage_df$method),
  palette = "Set 2"
)
names(pal_method) <- levels(coverage_df$method)

#####################################################
# Plot helper
#####################################################

plot_coverage <- function(df, estimand_label) {
  df %>%
    filter(estimand == estimand_label) %>%
    ggplot(aes(
      x = occasion,
      y = coverage,
      color = method,
      group = method
    )) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(
        ymin = coverage - mcse_coverage,
        ymax = coverage + mcse_coverage
      ),
      width = 0.15,
      linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
    ggh4x::facet_wrap2(~ scenario, nrow = 1, axes = "y") +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_method) +
    labs(
      x = "Occasion",
      y = "Coverage",
      color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      panel.spacing.x = unit(1.2, "cm"),
      strip.text      = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title      = element_text(size = 13),
      axis.text       = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text     = element_text(size = 12)
    )
}

#####################################################
# Build and display all four plots
#####################################################

plot_cov_XY <- plot_coverage(coverage_df, "XY")
plot_cov_YX <- plot_coverage(coverage_df, "YX")
plot_cov_AX <- plot_coverage(coverage_df, "AX")
plot_cov_AY <- plot_coverage(coverage_df, "AY")

plot_cov_XY
plot_cov_YX
plot_cov_AX
plot_cov_AY

```

### Plot 4.2: Type I Error Simulation Study 2

```{r}


#####################################################
# Build type I error data for all lagged parameters
#####################################################

# true parameters from the data-generating model
true_params <- tibble(
  estimand = c("XY", "YX", "AX", "AY"),
  true     = c(
    A[2, 1],  # XY
    A[1, 2],  # YX (typically 0)
    A[1, 1],  # AX
    A[2, 2]   # AY
  )
)

#####################################################
# --- p-values ---
#####################################################

pval_df <- results_sim2 %>%

  # only occasions with lagged parameters
  filter(occasion >= 2) %>%

  # reshape p-values to long format
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^p(XY|YX|A|AY)_"),
    names_to  = "param",
    values_to = "pval"
  ) %>%

  # drop failed fits
  filter(!is.na(pval)) %>%

  # identify estimand type and method
  mutate(
    estimand = case_when(
      str_detect(param, "^pXY_") ~ "XY",
      str_detect(param, "^pYX_") ~ "YX",
      str_detect(param, "^pA_")  ~ "AX",
      str_detect(param, "^pAY_") ~ "AY"
    ),

    method = param %>%
      str_remove("^p(XY|YX|A|AY)_") %>%
      recode(
        CLPM      = "CLPM",
        CLPM_Adj  = "Lin adj",
        CLPM_LBCA = "CLPM linear BCA",
        CLPM_XGB  = "CLPM XGB BCA",
        DPM       = "DPM",
        RI_CLPM   = "RI-CLPM"
      )
  ) %>%
  select(run, occasion, scenario, estimand, method, pval)

#####################################################
# Build type I error data frame
#####################################################

type1_df <- pval_df %>%

  # attach true parameter values
  left_join(true_params, by = "estimand") %>%

  # only estimands where the null is true (theta = 0)
  filter(true == 0) %>%

  # indicator: reject at alpha
  mutate(
    reject = (pval <= 0.05)
  ) %>%

  # type I error rate and Monte Carlo SE
  group_by(scenario, occasion, estimand, method) %>%
  reframe(
    nsim = n(),

    # type I error rate
    type1 = mean(reject),

    # Monte Carlo SE of type I error rate
    mcse_type1 =
      sqrt(type1 * (1 - type1) / nsim)
  ) %>%

  # clean factor ordering
  mutate(
    scenario = factor(scenario, levels = c("constant", "stepwise")),
    method   = factor(
      method,
      levels = c(
        "CLPM",
        "Lin adj",
        "CLPM linear BCA",
        "CLPM XGB BCA",
        "DPM",
        "RI-CLPM"
      )
    )
  )

#####################################################
# Colour palette for methods (shared across plots)
#####################################################

pal_method <- qualitative_hcl(
  n = nlevels(type1_df$method),
  palette = "Set 2"
)
names(pal_method) <- levels(type1_df$method)

#####################################################
# Plot: type I error (only for null-true estimands)
#####################################################

plot_type1 <- type1_df %>%

  ggplot(aes(
    x     = occasion,
    y     = type1,
    color = method,
    group = method
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = type1 - mcse_type1,
      ymax = type1 + mcse_type1
    ),
    width = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +

  # nominal alpha reference line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +

  # facet by scenario
  ggh4x::facet_wrap2(
    ~ scenario,
    nrow = 1,
    axes = "y"
  ) +

  # colours
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_method) +

  # labels
  labs(
    x = "Occasion",
    y = "Type I error",
    color = NULL
  ) +

  # scientific theme
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(1.2, "cm"),
    strip.text      = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title      = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text       = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 12)
  )

#####################################################
# Display plot
#####################################################

plot_type1

```

### 4.3: Type II Error Simulation Study 2


```{r}

#####################################################
# Build power data for all lagged parameters
#####################################################

# true parameters from the data-generating model
true_params <- tibble(
  estimand = c("XY", "YX", "AX", "AY"),
  true     = c(
    A[2, 1],  # XY
    A[1, 2],  # YX (usually 0)
    A[1, 1],  # AX
    A[2, 2]   # AY
  )
)

#####################################################
# --- p-values ---
#####################################################

pval_df <- results_sim2 %>%

  # only occasions with lagged parameters
  filter(occasion >= 2) %>%

  # reshape p-values to long format
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^p(XY|YX|A|AY)_"),
    names_to  = "param",
    values_to = "pval"
  ) %>%

  # drop failed fits
  filter(!is.na(pval)) %>%

  # identify estimand type and method
  mutate(
    estimand = case_when(
      str_detect(param, "^pXY_") ~ "XY",
      str_detect(param, "^pYX_") ~ "YX",
      str_detect(param, "^pA_")  ~ "AX",
      str_detect(param, "^pAY_") ~ "AY"
    ),

    method = param %>%
      str_remove("^p(XY|YX|A|AY)_") %>%
      recode(
        CLPM      = "CLPM",
        CLPM_Adj  = "Lin adj",
        CLPM_LBCA = "CLPM linear BCA",
        CLPM_XGB  = "CLPM XGB BCA",
        DPM       = "DPM",
        RI_CLPM   = "RI-CLPM"
      )
  ) %>%
  select(run, occasion, scenario, estimand, method, pval)

#####################################################
# Build power data frame
#####################################################

power_df <- pval_df %>%

  # attach true parameter values
  left_join(true_params, by = "estimand") %>%

  # only estimands where the null is false
  filter(true != 0) %>%

  # indicator: reject at alpha
  mutate(
    reject = (pval <= 0.05)
  ) %>%

  # power and Monte Carlo SE
  group_by(scenario, occasion, estimand, method) %>%
  reframe(
    nsim = n(),

    # power
    power = mean(reject),

    # Monte Carlo SE of power
    mcse_power =
      sqrt(power * (1 - power) / nsim)
  ) %>%

  # clean factor ordering
  mutate(
    scenario = factor(scenario, levels = c("constant", "stepwise")),
    method   = factor(
      method,
      levels = c(
        "CLPM",
        "Lin adj",
        "CLPM linear BCA",
        "CLPM XGB BCA",
        "DPM",
        "RI-CLPM"
      )
    )
  )

#####################################################
# Colour palette for methods (shared across plots)
#####################################################

pal_method <- qualitative_hcl(
  n = nlevels(power_df$method),
  palette = "Set 2"
)
names(pal_method) <- levels(power_df$method)

#####################################################
# Plot helper (used for all three estimands)
#####################################################

plot_power <- function(df, estimand_label) {

  df %>%
    filter(estimand == estimand_label) %>%

    ggplot(aes(
      x     = occasion,
      y     = power,
      color = method,
      group = method
    )) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(
        ymin = power - mcse_power,
        ymax = power + mcse_power
      ),
      width = 0.15,
      linewidth = 0.4
    ) +

    # reference line for high power
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +

    # facet by scenario
    ggh4x::facet_wrap2(
      ~ scenario,
      nrow = 1,
      axes = "y"
    ) +

    # colours
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_method) +

    # labels
    labs(
      x = "Occasion",
      y = "Power",
      color = NULL
    ) +

    # scientific theme
    theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      panel.spacing.x = unit(1.2, "cm"),
      strip.text      = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title      = element_text(size = 13),
      axis.text       = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text     = element_text(size = 12)
    )
}

#####################################################
# Build and display all three power plots
#####################################################

plot_power_XY <- plot_power(power_df, "XY")
plot_power_AX <- plot_power(power_df, "AX")
plot_power_AY <- plot_power(power_df, "AY")

plot_power_XY
plot_power_AX
plot_power_AY

```

Now we need to concatenate the plots:

```{r}

library(patchwork)

# create legendless plots
plot_relbias_XY_noleg <- plot_relbias_XY +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# combine the two
combined_XY <- plot_relbias_XY_noleg / plot_rmse_XY

ggsave(
  filename = "combined_XY_relbias_RMSE.png",
  plot     = combined_XY,
  path     = "C:/Users/Admin/Desktop",
  width    = 10,
  height   = 8,
  dpi      = 300
)

```
